case_title: WILLIAMS, KIRSIS E. vs. ERDEN, IHSAN et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, KIRSIS E. AS TO DEFENDANT ERDEN, IHSAN ERDEN, SEMRA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAY-06-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-05-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       APR-16-1996

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-06-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON MAY-06-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR JUN-05-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JUL-22-1996, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JUL-22-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 2ND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE AUG-15-1996 CONTINUED FROM JUL-22-1996 TO AUG-21-1996 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-21-1996, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON AUG-21-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 4TH ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE PER CCP 575.2: AS TO WHY THIS ACTION SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED AND TO RESPOND TO THE COURT'S FACT FINDING INQUIRY INTO COUNSEL'S ROLE IN THE ABOVE MENTIONED PARTY'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE TRIAL COURT DELAY REDUCTION ACT AND THE LOCAL RULES OF COURT. FAILURE TO APPEAR AND/OR GOOD CAUSE WILL RESULT IN DISMISSAL., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-15-1996 CONTINUED FROM AUG-21-1996 TO SEP-20-1996 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
PHOTOCOPY FOR 11 COPIES FOR CASE NUMBER 126657. PLTF COPIES. FOR PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, KIRSIS E.
PHOTOCOPY FOR 21 COPIES FOR CASE NUMBER 126657. PLTF COPIES. FOR PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, KIRSIS E.

OSC CALENDAR OF JUN-05-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), OR FOR AN ORDER TO PUBLISH. PLAINTIFF TO NOTIFY DEFT. OF NEW DATE IF SERVED. HEARING SET FOR JUL-22-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, KIRSIS E.
